steps.title: Substitute y = 4 into the equation
steps.content:
We're told there are 4 select grade Buffalo Nickels in the collection, so $y = 4$. Substitute this value into the equation:
$$9x + 12(4) = 174$$

steps.title: Solve for x by isolating it
steps.content:
Simplify the left side:
$$9x + 48 = 174$$
Subtract 48 from both sides:
$$9x = 126$$
Divide both sides by 9:
$$x = 14$$
There are 14 premium grade Liberty Nickels in the collection.
